body:
Fix:
1. Damage displayed on the front end after talent enhancement was inconsistent with the actual damage dealt(Because backend damage calculation only occurs after the card-playing action is completed, it is necessary to reproduce the player's buffs and damage calculations on the frontend to ensure that the estimated damage displayed on the frontend matches the actual damage)
2. The health point returned after retrying the current floor was not full
3. Failing at floor 10 and retrying the current floor would start from floor 1
4. After clearing floor 10, the game would get stuck on the screen where the boss's health was 0, and the completion page would not appear
title: fix: rogue mode damage display and save point bug
